calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Gender Change and issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Hannah Devereaux present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Physician's Declaration on file.

No objections to the gender change and issuance of new birth certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the gender Change from male to female, and grants the issuance of a New Birth Certificate. Court retains jurisdiction in case petitioner has any problems with the issuance of new birth certificate under her name Hannah Devereaux obtain by petitioner via Decree Changing Name issued by court under Case No.CNC-04-541655 In re: MIcah James signed on April 21, 2005.
Order for Change of Gender and issuance of New Birth Certificate signed by the court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Gender and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288

There being no appearance by Petitioner, the Court ordered OSC off calendar and dissolved.
